𝗡𝗘𝗧𝗪𝗔𝗧𝗖𝗛 | Live network forensics and incident response in the terminal.  🔥 Super Hot!

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Live network forensics and incident response in the terminal.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time network forensics TUI
✅ TLS 1.3 decryption
✅ JA4 / JA4Q fingerprinting
✅ 17 L7 protocol decoders
✅ Kernel-level process attribution (eBPF)
✅ Built-in network intelligence (port-scan, beaconing, DNS-tunnel detection)
✅ Flight Recorder for evidence capture
✅ Landlock sandbox


✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 72 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

NetWatch is a real-time network forensics tool that runs in the terminal, offering deep packet inspection, TLS 1.3 decryption, and network intelligence like JA4 fingerprinting and C2 beaconing detection. It provides live triage and evidence capture capabilities without requiring any configuration.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/matthart1983/netwatch

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗕𝗘𝗘 | Downloading videos and audio from a wide variety of online sources.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Downloading videos and audio from a wide variety of online sources.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Download videos and audios from 1000+ websites worldwide
✅ Built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp
✅ Clean, intuitive user interface
✅ One-click pause/resume/retry
✅ Real-time progress tracking
✅ Comprehensive download queue management
✅ RSS auto-download automation
✅ Configurable output containers


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 9.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 718 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 59 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

VidBee is an open-source video downloader built with Electron and powered by yt-dlp. It allows users to download videos and audio from over 1000 websites with a clean, intuitive interface and features like RSS auto-download.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/nexmoe/VidBee

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗔𝗜-𝗪𝗘𝗕𝗦𝗜𝗧𝗘-𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗘𝗥-𝗧𝗘𝗠𝗣𝗟𝗔𝗧𝗘 | To automatically reverse-engineer and clone existing websites into a functional Next.js project using AI.  📈 Growing!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automatically reverse-engineer and clone existing websites into a functional Next.js project using AI.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Clone any website with one command
✅ AI-powered website reconstruction
✅ Extracts design tokens and assets
✅ Writes component specifications
✅ Dispatches parallel builders for section reconstruction
✅ Supports multiple AI coding agents (Claude Code recommended)
✅ Generates a clean, modern Next.js codebase


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 16.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 2.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a reusable template for cloning any website into a Next.js codebase using AI coding agents. It automates the process of inspecting a site, extracting design elements, and reconstructing its structure.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template

𝗠𝗟-𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗡 | To act as an autonomous ML engineer, automating ML development tasks from research to deployment using the Hugging Face ecosystem.  🌟 Rising Fast!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To act as an autonomous ML engineer, automating ML development tasks from research to deployment using the Hugging Face ecosystem.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Autonomous ML code research, writing, and shipping
✅ Integration with Hugging Face ecosystem (docs, papers, datasets, compute)
✅ Interactive and headless CLI modes
✅ Support for various LLMs including local models via LiteLLM
✅ Optional sandbox environment for tool execution
✅ Configurable via environment variables and CLI arguments


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 10.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ml-intern is an open-source AI agent that automates the process of researching, writing, and shipping ML code. It leverages the Hugging Face ecosystem for access to documentation, papers, datasets, and cloud compute, offering both interactive and headless modes for various use cases.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/huggingface/ml-intern
